column1: He said to her, “Where do you usually spend your summer holidays?” - He asked her where she usually_________her summer holiday.
They said to him, “What time does the train leave?” - They asked him what time the train_________ .
Where does he live? - Nobody knew where he____________ .
I said to Boris, “Does your friend live in London?” - I asked Boris If his friend________in London.
He said to me, “Do you often go to see your friends?” - He asked me whether I often_________to see my friends.
- Do they know anything about it? - I wondered if they________anything about it.
- Does she know the name of the man? - I doubted If she____________the name of the man.
Kate said, “Mike, do you like my dress?” - Kate asked If Mike___________her dress.
“Why don’t you play with your friends, Kate?” said her mother. - Kate's mother________why Kate didn't play with her friends.
“Do you like chocolates?” my little sister said to me. - My little sister_______me if I liked chocolate.
The doctor asked Nick, “Do you wash your face and hands every morning?” - The doctor asked If he _________his face and hands every morning.
The teacher said to Mike, “Does your father work at a factory?” - The teacher asked Mike If his father_________at a factory.
